name: What the Waveform Knows: Transparent-first Speech and Audio Intelligence with Caption Studio
summary: arXiv:2607.18704v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Caption Studio is a transparency-first speech and audio intelligence platform that transforms spoken audio and video into structured, searchable co...
description: arXiv:2607.18704v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Caption Studio is a transparency-first speech and audio intelligence platform that transforms spoken audio and video into structured, searchable content through automated transcription, speaker diarization, speech analytics, signal-level audio analysis, and subtitle generation. The system is built on a FastAPI backend with a real-time dashboard...
author: Cheng Siong Chin, Jianhua Zhang, Mohan Venkateshkumar
